title: Tender to Isabell Princess of the Sea/RIB Vega report published
body: "Today, we have published our accident investigation report into the collision between the tender to Isabell Princess of the Sea and the RIB Vega in the port of Göcek, Turkey, resulting in 1 fatality on 27 July 2024.   The report, available via this link, contains details of what happened and subsequent actions taken.   This investigation was carried out by the UK Marine Accident Investigation Branch (MAIB) on behalf of the Gibraltar Office of the Marine Accident Investigation Compliance Officer in accordance with the Memorandum of Understanding between the MAIB and the Red Ensign Group Category 1 registries of Isle of Man, Cayman Islands, Bermuda and Gibraltar.   Media enquiries (telephone only)       Media enquiries during office hours 01932 440015   Media enquiries out of hours 0300 7777878       "
